I think we should start in the east. Spring is the time for new ideas. Logic and reason will guide us.

We together build our community in the south during summer. Our ethics and trust are strong.

You look to the west in autumn and feel the beauty of change. Art and emotion matter.

They control the north during winter with strong will and power. Their spirit and courage prevail.

Mixed: I propose a system that combines reason, community, beauty, and will. Let's start in the east, grow in the south, reflect in the west, and find stability in the north.
